title: Replit 支持并行构建多个项目
full_text:
Replit ⠕ on X: "New video is out! You no longer build one thing at a time on Replit.
Run parallel agents to ship a website, mobile app, video, and pitch deck from one project, all at once.
And you can now add multiple artifacts to projects you already have. https://t.co/kgNPiFzzom" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Replit ⠕
@Replit
New video is out! You no longer build one thing at a time on Replit.
Run parallel agents to ship a website, mobile app, video, and pitch deck from one project, all at once.
And you can now add multiple artifacts to projects you already have.
00:00
7:00 PM · Jun 12, 2026 4.2K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Replit 支持并行构建多个项目
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 新视频发布了！你在 Replit 上不再一次只能构建一件事。 运行并行 AI 智能体，从一个项目中同时交付网站、移动应用、视频和推介材料。 而且你现在可以向已有的项目中添加多个工件。

key_excerpts.text: 新视频发布了！你在 Replit 上不再一次只能构建一件事。 运行并行 AI 智能体，从一个项目中同时交付网站、移动应用、视频和推介材料。 而且你现在可以向已有的项目中添加多个工件。
Replit ⠕ on X: "New video is out!
You no longer build one thing at a time on Replit.
Run parallel agents to ship a website, mobile app, video, and pitch deck from one project, all at once.
And you can now add multiple artifacts to projects you already have.
co/kgNPiFzzom" / X Post Log in Sign up Post Replit ⠕ @Replit New video is out!
